nodes.label: MIDI Note Number
nodes.description: Reads the note number (0-127) from the incoming note-on MIDI event

nodes.label: Normalize
nodes.description: Divides the note number by 127.0 to produce a 0-1 range value

nodes.label: Table Lookup
nodes.description: Maps the normalized note number through a user-defined curve table (0-1 in, 0-1 out). Always active -- no UseTable toggle.

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Final modulation value (0-1) sent to the parent modulation chain
